title: L.A. World Trade Center to be converted into 512 apartments
body_text: Synthetic fixture based on the D.2v validation notes. Jamison Services plans to convert an office tower near 350 S. Figueroa Street in Downtown Los Angeles into 512 apartments. The prior hotel program included 686 rooms.

title: Affordable housing pitched for property at 2101 W. 8th Street in Westlake
body_text: Synthetic fixture based on the D.2v validation notes. The article body references nearby parcels at 751-757 S. Alvarado Street and 740 S. Alvarado Street, plus a separate 57-unit prior project. The primary address appears only in the title.

title: Downtown Women's Center project rises at 501 E. 5th Street
body_text: Synthetic fixture based on the D.2v validation notes. The 97-unit apartment project is under construction at 501 E. 5th Street in Downtown Los Angeles. Completion is expected in Fall 2027.

title: Tishman Speyer rolls out updated plans for two additional Santa Monica sites
body_text: Synthetic fixture based on the D.2v validation notes. WS Communities is planning a 120-unit apartment building at 1318 Lincoln Boulevard in Santa Monica. A second phase would include 110 apartments with 35 affordable units.

title: Work begins on 83-acre development at the former Westminster Mall
body_text: Synthetic fixture based on the D.2v validation notes. Construction began on a master plan with 2,250 residential units, retail space, and public open space at the former mall property.
